title: A2A Task Lifecycle State Transitions (v0)
description: Allowed state transitions for A2A task lifecycle. This fixture is a machine-readable reference for broker/plugin/runner validation.

queued.description: Task accepted but not assigned to a worker.

claimed.description: A worker has reserved the task.

running.description: Worker is inspecting or changing repository content.

cancelling.description: Cancellation requested; worker notified to stop safely.

done.description: Work completed without a PR requirement, with redacted evidence.

pr.description: Work completed with a PR URL and required check evidence.

blocked.description: Worker cannot safely or correctly complete the task.

cancelled.description: Task cancelled by operator, timeout, or block escalation.
